reviews.author: Sunita Sharma
reviews.review_body:
As I myself am from the Education Department,I know what efforts a teacher goes through.I would really appreciate you for all the hard work you have done.I did not expect at all that this level of hard work would be done in the nursery class. Or will the child's learning remain so strong.
Or all this has become possible because of your efforts. I have seen my daughter's excitement every day to go to school. just because she knew Priyanka ma'am would be there.It is best that you provide additional efforts according to the student's requirements. And your coordination with parents is commendable.🫡👏👏👏✨

reviews.author: Meghna Ahuja
reviews.review_body: As a parent, I always aspire to see my child Devanshi Ahuja to grow as an independent person. MRIS has been instrumental in achieving this growth. Since Toddlers till Grade 10 now, I have seen exponential skill development in her. Devanshi has a creative bent of mind, which is explored to its full potential here. MRIS is a platform of opportunities which ensures that every student participates, puts in efforts, and reaps the benefits of it. The school prioritizes a strong bond among teachers, students and parents.

reviews.author: Girish Jain
reviews.review_body: I had a wonderful experience at Manav Rachna International School, Sector-14. The school is blessed to have teachers who develop a bond not only with kids but also with their parents. Kids are also provided with amazing opportunities for holistic development. There is a focus on not only academics but also on extracurriculars. Really appreciate the great efforts being put in by the MRIS management. In coming time, this school is going to achieve next level heights under able guidance of Mrs. Wadhwa and Mrs. Kathuria.

reviews.author: deepika rajpal
reviews.review_body: My daughter studies in MRIS, Sector - 14 Faridabad. She thrives in a nurturing environment that fosters learning, growth and creativity. Teachers exhibit remarkable proficiency, ensuring child’s needs are met. Grateful for their dedication to creating a supportive and enriching educational journey. Highly recommend this school for a holistic learning experience.

reviews.author: kavita rawat
reviews.review_body:
I am immensely grateful to Ms. Vibha Sharma, the best teacher ever and the class in-charge of my daughter, for her dedication and experience in guiding her through her matric education. Her active involvement with parents has truly transformed my daughter's learning journey. The bond we share with you and the school is invaluable, fostering a supportive environment. I deeply appreciate your efforts in shaping her educational path.

Warm regards,
Kavita Rawat

reviews.author: Kunal Yadav
reviews.review_body: The best part in Manav Rachna (Sector-14) is that the teachers let the student question status quo and work very hard with the student to strengthen any weak area. We have personal  experience of this and are grateful to all the teachers of Class XI B as they never gave up on my Son and kept on encouraging him to do better. The infrastructure of School is absolutely World Class and is probably one of the best in the Country today and certainly is the best in Delhi-NCR.

reviews.author: Bhavna devacharya
reviews.review_body:
School plays an important role in developing the overall growth of children and MRIS is playing commendable role in it.  The opportunities for extracurricular activities are fantastic. Thank you for your hard work in supporting my daughter Parnika Devacharya .Your patience and commitment to supporting my child has mean a lot to our family.
With your guidance, our daughter has developed into a confident and capable child. Thank you for being such an important part in our child’s development.

reviews.author: Kavita Kukreja
reviews.review_body: What an Amazing School !!! Teachers, Curriculum, Student Support, Infrastructure everything is Top Notch...  A wonderful learning experience created for the students by the faculty. Here, Students learn not for the sake of learning but for the fun of it. Thank You MRIS - 14.

reviews.author: Manish Sekhri
reviews.review_body:
As a parent of Bhavvya Sekhri of grade IX-C, my experience with the school has been exceptionally positive. From academics, sports, art, technology to events and webinars, the school focuses on all rounded and holistic development of our children. I've been with the school for the past 10 years, and I feel very connected and valued being a member of this community. The teachers are very passionate and dedicated, ensuring that each child receives individual attention and support at all times. Children also get the opportunity to participate in all extracurricular activities which enrich them with important life and social skills like teamwork, leadership and time management. They also assist the child to participate in events, webinars and competitions which will help them to develop confidence and learn from their failures.
I am grateful to be a part of it and am confident that my child is receiving an education that will prepare them for success in the future.

reviews.author: Megha Sharma
reviews.review_body:
My ward has been enrolled in this school for past almost 12 years and I can say this with utmost honesty that it has been a great and vivid journey of hers. Everything in the school from facilities to knowledge has been given
great care. This experience has been one with no regrets.
Thank you.
